reports.title_en: FSB Regional Consultative Group for Sub-Saharan Africa meets in Mauritius
reports.title_zh: FSB撒哈拉以南非洲區域諮詢小組於模里西斯舉行會議
reports.summary_en: Bank of Mauritius hosts FSB Sub-Saharan Africa group in Mauritius.
reports.intro: 模里西斯央行於模里西斯主辦FSB撒哈拉以南非洲小組會議。

reports.title_en: Exploring cross-sectoral interconnections in resolution planning
reports.title_zh: 探討清理計畫中跨部門的相互關聯性
reports.summary_en: In this speech, FSB Secretary General, John Schindler highlights the importance of resolve in resolution planning, emphasising collaboration, preparedness, in maintaining financial system resilience.
reports.intro: FSB秘書長John Schindler在本演說中強調清理計畫執行決心的重要性，並著重於協作與整備以維持金融體系韌性。

reports.title_en: Cross-Border Payments: Towards the Next Chapter
reports.title_zh: 跨境支付：邁向下一篇章
reports.summary_en: At the virtual event, hosted by OMFIF, FSB Deputy Secretary General calls for a debate on the next steps for cross-border payments beyond 2027.
reports.intro: 在OMFIF主辦的線上活動中，FSB副秘書長呼籲就2027年後跨境支付的下一步進行討論。

reports.title_en: Opening remarks for the FSB 2026 ReSolve Event: Exploring cross-sectoral interconnections and financial stability implications
reports.title_zh: FSB 2026年ReSolve活動開幕致詞：探討跨部門相互關聯性及其對金融穩定之影響
reports.summary_en: In this speech, Dominique Laboureix, Chair of the FSB Resolution Steering Group, discusses the importance of cross-border, cross-sectoral crisis preparedness.
reports.intro: FSB清理處理指導小組主席Dominique Laboureix在本演說中闡述跨境、跨部門危機整備的重要性。

reports.title_en: Opening remarks on sound practices for artificial intelligence
reports.title_zh: 人工智慧穩健實務開幕致詞
reports.summary_en: In her remarks, Michelle W. Bowman, Chair of the FSB Standing Committee on Supervisory and Regulatory Cooperation (SRC), discusses the FSB’s Consultation Report on the Sound Practices for Responsible Adoption of Artificial Intelligence.
reports.intro: FSB監理與監管合作常設委員會（SRC）主席Michelle W. Bowman在致詞中說明FSB有關人工智慧負責任採用之穩健實務諮詢報告。

reports.title_en: Global Event Series: IFAC Connect LATAM 2026 Highlights
reports.title_zh: 全球系列活動：IFAC Connect LATAM 2026重點回顧
reports.summary_en: From May 20 to May 21, 2026, IFAC, in collaboration with member PAO Federación Argentina de Consejos Profesionales de Ciencias Económicas (FACPCE), and La Asociación Internamericana de Contabilidad (AIC), hosted IFAC Connect LATAM 2026, part of IFAC’s ongoing Connect series.
reports.intro: IFAC於2026年5月20日至21日，與會員組織阿根廷經濟科學專業委員會聯合會（FACPCE）及美洲會計師協會（AIC）合作，共同舉辦「IFAC Connect LATAM 2026」，此為IFAC持續辦理之Connect系列活動之一。

reports.title_en: Virtual outreach event on FSB sound practices for financial institutions’ responsible adoption of artificial intelligence
reports.title_zh: FSB金融機構負責任採用人工智慧穩健實務線上宣導活動
reports.summary_en: The FSB hosted a virtual outreach event on 7 July 2026.
reports.intro: FSB於2026年7月7日舉辦線上宣導活動。

reports.title_en: FSB consults on sound practices for the responsible adoption of artificial intelligence (AI)
reports.title_zh: FSB就負責任採用人工智慧（AI）之健全做法徵詢意見
reports.summary_en: FSB seeks feedback on proposed sound practices for financial institutions to adopt, use, and innovate with AI in a responsible manner.
reports.intro: FSB就金融機構如何負責任地採用、使用及創新運用AI之健全做法草案徵求意見。

reports.title_en: Sound Practices for Responsible Adoption of Artificial Intelligence (AI): Consultation report
reports.title_zh: 負責任採用人工智慧（AI）之健全做法：諮詢報告
reports.summary_en: The FSB has developed sound practices to help all types of financial institutions navigate benefits and risks responsibly as they adopt AI.
reports.intro: FSB制定健全做法，協助各類型金融機構在採用AI過程中，負責任地權衡其效益與風險。

reports.intro: FSB舉辦研討會，支持會員推動監理與法規現代化之相關努力。

reports.title_en: Report on Vulnerabilities in Private Credit
reports.title_zh: 私募信貸脆弱性報告
reports.summary_en: Private credit has expanded rapidly to an estimated $1.5–2 trillion in assets, supporting financing for mid-sized companies but creating potential financial stability risks…
reports.intro: 私募信貸市場快速成長，資產規模估計達1.5兆至2兆美元，雖有助於支持中型企業融資，但亦可能帶來潛在的金融穩定風險。

reports.title_en: Scope of Insurers Subject to the Recovery and Resolution Planning Requirements in the FSB Key Attributes: Final Report
reports.title_zh: FSB《關鍵屬性》中適用復原與清理計畫要求之保險業者範圍：最終報告
reports.summary_en: Final guidance outlines key criteria for authorities to consider in assessing individual insurers and specifies circumstances when recovery and resolution planning requirements should always apply.
reports.intro: 最終指引闡明主管機關評估個別保險業者應考量之關鍵標準，並specifies於何種情況下應一律適用復原與清理計畫要求。

reports.title_en: FSB Chair’s letter to G20 Finance Ministers and Central Bank Governors: April 2026
reports.title_zh: FSB主席致G20財政部長暨央行總裁函：2026年4月
reports.summary_en: FSB Chair warns that the risk of multiple vulnerabilities crystallising simultaneously has increased, posing a heightened threat to global financial stability.
reports.intro: FSB主席警示，多重脆弱性同時浮現的風險已上升，對全球金融穩定構成升高的威脅。

reports.title_en: Promoting Global Financial Stability: 2025 FSB Annual Report
reports.title_zh: 促進全球金融穩定：2025年FSB年報
reports.summary_en: Against a backdrop of rising vulnerabilities, in 2025 the FSB delivered work in key areas such as NBFI leverage, crypto-assets and stablecoins, operational resilience and enhanced cross-border…
reports.intro: 在脆弱性升高的背景下，FSB於2025年在非銀行金融中介（NBFI）槓桿、加密資產與穩定幣、作業韌性及強化跨境合作等關鍵領域推動相關工作。

reports.title_zh: 2025年清理與清償報告：「從計畫到實踐：處置機制之落實」
reports.summary_en: Foundational resolution frameworks are now mostly in place, with significant progress in operational planning and resolvability assessments.
reports.intro: 基礎處置架構大致已建置完成，且在作業規劃及可處置性評估方面已有顯著進展。

reports.title_en: Global Monitoring Report on Nonbank Financial Intermediation 2025
reports.title_zh: 2025年非銀行金融中介全球監測報告
reports.summary_en: This year’s report presents enhanced data on nonbanks’ use of wholesale funding and finance companies’ loan assets, including mortgage loans.
reports.intro: 本年度報告提供非銀行機構運用批發性資金及金融公司貸款資產（含房貸）之強化數據。

reports.summary_en: List of G-SIBs remains at 29, with two banks moving into a higher bucket and one bank moving into a lower bucket.
reports.intro: G-SIBs名單維持29家，其中2家銀行調升至較高分組，1家銀行調降至較低分組。

reports.title_en: staff guidance page in the Standards section

reports.summary_en: The PCAOB staff develop guidance to assist in the implementation of PCAOB standards and rules. The documents represent the views of PCAOB staff and not necessarily those of the Board. The documents are not rules, policies, or statements of the Board.
reports.intro: PCAOB職員擬訂指引以協助落實PCAOB準則與規則。相關文件僅代表PCAOB職員意見，未必代表理事會立場，且非屬理事會之規則、政策或聲明。

reports.title_en: Investor Advisory: PCAOB Investor Advisory Group Requests Public Submit Examples of Critical or Key Audit Matters
reports.title_zh: 投資人諮詢：PCAOB投資人諮詢小組徵求關鍵查核事項範例
reports.summary_en: The Public Company Accounting Oversight Board’s (PCAOB or “the Board”) Office of the Investor Advocate is alerting investors to the opportunity to provide the PCAOB Investor Advisory Group with examples of critical audit matters or key audit matters for analysis.
reports.intro: 美國上市公司會計監督委員會（PCAOB）投資人保護辦公室提醒投資人，可提供關鍵查核事項或重大查核事項範例，供PCAOB投資人諮詢小組分析之用。

reports.title_en: Investor Bulletin: An Introduction to PCAOB Inspections
reports.title_zh: 投資人公報：PCAOB檢查制度簡介
reports.summary_en: This document represents the views of the Public Company Accounting Oversight Board (PCAOB) Office of the Investor Advocate and not necessarily those of other PCAOB staff or the Board. It is not a rule, policy, or statement of the Board.
reports.intro: 本文件代表美國上市公司會計監督委員會（PCAOB）投資人保護辦公室之意見，未必代表其他PCAOB職員或理事會立場，亦非理事會之規則、政策或聲明。

reports.title_en: Investor Bulletin: The Importance of Auditor Professional Responsibilities and Ethics
reports.title_zh: 投資人公告：查核人員專業責任與道德規範的重要性
reports.summary_en: This document represents the views of the Public Company Accounting Oversight Board (PCAOB) Office of the Investor Advocate and not necessarily those of other PCAOB staff or the Board. It is not a rule, policy, or statement of the Board.
reports.intro: 本文件僅代表美國上市公司會計監督委員會（PCAOB）投資人辯護辦公室之觀點，未必代表PCAOB其他幕僚或委員會之立場，亦非委員會之規則、政策或正式聲明。

reports.summary_en: The Public Company Accounting Oversight Board’s (PCAOB or “the Board”) Office of the Investor Advocate is alerting investors to the opportunity to provide the PCAOB Investor Advisory Group with examples of critical audit matters or key audit matters for analysis.

reports.title_en: Data Points: Financial Restatements and Auditor Turnover
reports.title_zh: 數據觀點：財務重編與查核人員異動
reports.summary_en: From 2005 to 2024, Big R financial restatements occurred at a rate of around 3% per year. 1 On average, just under 30% of these restatements followed an auditor change in the previous year. As a point of reference, the average annual auditor-change rate across the broader population, which includes companies without Big R restatements, was 11%.
reports.intro: 2005年至2024年間，重大財務重編（Big R）的年發生率約為3%。平均而言，這些重編案件中近30%發生在前一年變更查核人員之後；相較之下，涵蓋無重大重編公司之整體母體的平均年度查核人員變動率為11%。

reports.title_zh: 投資人公告：就強化查核人員因應特定已評估重大不實表達風險之提案徵求意見
reports.summary_en: The Public Company Accounting Oversight Board (PCAOB or the “Board”) Office of the Investor Advocate is alerting investors to the opportunity to comment on the proposal regarding designing and performing substantive analytical procedures and amendments to other PCAOB standards.
reports.intro: 美國上市公司會計監督委員會（PCAOB，以下簡稱「委員會」）投資人保護辦公室提醒投資人，可就「設計及執行實質性分析程序」提案及其他PCAOB準則之相關修訂提供意見。

reports.title_zh: 投資人公告－就PCAOB擬議更新之審計人員運用資料分析準則徵求意見之機會
reports.summary_en: The Public Company Accounting Oversight Board’s (PCAOB or “the Board”) Office of the Investor Advocate is alerting investors to the opportunity to comment on the PCAOB’s Proposed Amendments Related to Aspects of Designing and Performing Audit Procedures That Involve Technology-Assisted Analysis of Information in Electronic Form.
reports.intro: 美國上市公司會計監督委員會（PCAOB）投資人保護辦公室提醒投資人，可就PCAOB提出之「涉及以科技輔助分析電子形式資訊之審計程序設計與執行相關修正案」提出意見。

reports.intro: 美國上市公司會計監督委員會（PCAOB）投資人保護辦公室提醒投資人，可就PCAOB提出之「有關公司違反法令之審計準則修正案及其他相關修正案」提出意見。

reports.title_en: Investor Bulletin - Opportunity to Comment on Proposed Standard Addressing Core Auditing Principles and Responsibilities
reports.title_zh: 投資人公告－就核心審計原則與責任擬議準則徵求意見之機會
reports.summary_en: The Public Company Accounting Oversight Board’s (PCAOB or “Board”) Office of Investor Advocate is alerting investors to the opportunity to comment on the PCAOB’s proposed auditing standard, AS 1000, General Responsibilities of the Auditor in Conducting an Audit.
reports.intro: 美國上市公司會計監督委員會（PCAOB）投資人保護辦公室提醒投資人，可就PCAOB提出之審計準則草案AS 1000「審計人員執行審計之一般責任」提出意見。

reports.title_en: Investor Advisory - Exercise Caution with Independent Verification/Proof of Reserve Reports
reports.title_zh: 投資人警示－審慎看待獨立驗證／準備金證明報告
reports.summary_en: Proof of reserve reports are inherently limited, and customers should exercise extreme caution when relying on them to conclude that there are sufficient assets to meet customer liabilities.
reports.intro: 準備金證明報告本質上具有其侷限性，客戶不應僅憑該報告即認定有足夠資產可支應客戶負債，應審慎評估。

reports.title_en: Spotlight: The PCAOB’s Use of Economic Analysis and Stakeholder Input in Standard Setting
reports.title_zh: 焦點報導：PCAOB 於準則制定過程中運用經濟分析與利害關係人意見之情形

reports.title_en: Guide to Reading the PCAOB's New Inspection Report
reports.title_zh: PCAOB新版檢查報告閱讀指南

reports.title_en: Thematic Peer Review on Public Sector Backstop Funding Mechanisms: Summary Terms of Reference
reports.title_zh: 公部門後盾融資機制主題式同儕審查：職權範圍摘要
reports.summary_en: Peer review aims to assess FSB members’ progress and adherence with policies on establishing public sector backstop funding mechanisms, if needed as a last resort to achieve an orderly resolution.
reports.intro: 本項同儕審查旨在評估FSB會員國於建立公部門後盾融資機制（作為達成有序清理最後手段之必要時使用）相關政策上之進展與遵循情形。

reports.title_en: Public responses to consultation on Scope of Insurers Subject to the Recovery and Resolution Planning Requirements in the FSB Key Attributes
reports.title_zh: 「FSB核心要素中適用復原與清理計畫規範之保險公司範圍」諮詢意見公開回應
reports.summary_en: Consultation responses to ‘Scope of Insurers Subject to the Recovery and Resolution Planning Requirements in the FSB Key Attributes: Consultation report‘.
reports.intro: 本文為針對「FSB核心要素中適用復原與清理計畫規範之保險公司範圍：諮詢報告」所收到之公開回應意見。

reports.title_en: Vulnerabilities in Government Bond-backed Repo Markets
reports.title_zh: 政府公債擔保附買回市場之脆弱性
reports.summary_en: Vulnerabilities within repo markets’ segments have the potential to spread through the financial system.
reports.intro: 附買回市場各區塊內的脆弱性有可能擴散至整體金融體系。

reports.title_en: Good Practices for Crisis Management Groups (Revised Version)
reports.title_zh: 危機管理小組良好實務作法（修訂版）
reports.summary_en: Supplementary information added to the 2021 Good Practices for Crisis Management Groups aims to enhance crisis coordination between home and host authorities outside of crisis management groups.
reports.intro: 本文為2021年版「危機管理小組良好實務作法」新增之補充資訊，旨在強化母國與地主國主管機關於危機管理小組架構外之危機協調合作。

reports.title_en: Scope of Insurers Subject to the Recovery and Resolution Planning Requirements in the FSB Key Attributes: Consultation report
reports.title_zh: 適用FSB關鍵屬性復原與清理計畫要求之保險業者範圍：諮詢報告
reports.summary_en: Guidance outlines key criteria that authorities should consider when evaluating whether an insurer should be subject to recovery and resolution planning requirements.
reports.intro: 本指引說明主管機關於評估保險業者是否應納入復原與清理計畫要求時，應考量之關鍵標準。

reports.title_en: The FSB reaffirms its decision to use IAIS Holistic Framework assessments instead of an annual identification of global systemically important insurers
reports.title_zh: FSB重申將採用IAIS整體架構評估取代全球系統重要性保險業者之年度指認
reports.summary_en: Guidance offers a structured approach for authorities to assess which insurers should be subject to recovery and resolution planning requirements.
reports.intro: 本指引為主管機關評估哪些保險業者應納入復原與清理計畫要求，提供結構化之評估方法。
